description_long: A muscular male security guard stands upright, wearing a sleeveless maroon tactical vest over a tight shirt, with visible body armor and utility pouches strapped around his torso. His arms are extended horizontally, revealing black fingerless gloves and a wrist device on his left arm. He has short, slicked-back blond hair and a stern facial expression. The guard is dressed in camouflage-patterned cargo pants tucked into heavy-duty black combat boots. Around his waist, a thick utility belt holds various equipment, including a holstered sidearm and additional pouches. The overall appearance is that of a well-equipped, physically imposing security professional ready for urban patrol.
description: A muscular male security guard in a maroon tactical vest, camouflage pants, and combat boots, equipped with utility gear and a stern demeanor.
description_view_0: Side view showing the guard's profile, utility belt, holstered weapon, and wrist device.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the guard's facial features, tactical vest, extended arms, and chest armor.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile displaying the other arm, gloves, and side pouches.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the back of the tactical vest, utility belt, and the back of the boots and pants.
attribute_uniform_type: The security guard wears a sleeveless maroon tactical vest with body armor over a tight shirt, camouflage cargo pants, and black combat boots. The uniform is utilitarian and militaristic, featuring a thick utility belt with pouches and a holster, fingerless gloves, and a wrist-mounted device. The overall style is informal and practical, designed for mobility and readiness rather than formality.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose, projecting alertness and readiness.
